name: Structured Tote Bag
description: Large structured top-handle tote in pebbled vegan leather. Zip closure, internal pockets, and detachable shoulder strap. Office and weekend ready.

name: Mini Crossbody Bag
description: Compact crossbody bag with a flap closure, chain strap, and a small interior pocket. Perfect for evenings and travel.

name: Canvas Weekender Bag
description: Spacious waxed canvas weekender with leather handles and a detachable shoulder strap. Fits 1–2 days of essentials.

name: Bucket Bag
description: Slouchy drawstring bucket bag in soft suede with a leather trim and a removable interior pouch.

name: Quilted Chain Flap Bag
description: Classic quilted flap bag with gold-tone hardware, a chain shoulder strap, and a turn-lock closure. Timeless and sophisticated.

name: Straw Raffia Tote
description: Handwoven straw raffia tote with leather handles and a contrast lining. Perfect for beach days and summer outings.

name: Leather Zip Clutch
description: Sleek zip-top clutch in smooth leather with a card slot and wrist strap. Doubles as a wallet.

name: Embellished Evening Clutch
description: Sparkling crystal-embellished minaudière clutch with a magnetic snap closure. The perfect party accessory.

name: Backpack — Mini
description: Compact mini backpack in soft faux leather with padding straps, a front zip pocket, and a main compartment.

name: Bum Bag / Belt Bag
description: Nylon belt bag with an adjustable waist strap, front zip pocket, and a secondary zip compartment. Hands-free and functional.

name: Link Chain Statement Necklace
description: Bold chunky link chain necklace in gold-tone. Adjustable length, lobster clasp. Elevates any look instantly.

name: Layered Pendant Necklace
description: Delicate three-layer necklace with a star, moon, and heart pendant. Dainty and perfect for everyday layering.

name: Hoop Earrings — Gold
description: Classic large gold hoop earrings in lightweight brass with gold plating. Hypoallergenic posts.

name: Statement Drop Earrings
description: Dramatic drop earrings with resin or stone embellishment. A single statement piece that transforms a simple look.

name: Stackable Ring Set
description: Set of 5 mixed gold and silver stackable rings in various textures — plain band, twisted, beaded, and signet.

name: Pearl Stud Earrings
description: Classic freshwater pearl stud earrings. Timeless, elegant, and versatile for everyday and formal wear.

name: Beaded Stretch Bracelet
description: Natural stone beaded stretch bracelet with semi-precious stones. Each stone has unique markings.

name: Women's Leather Belt
description: Slim 20mm leather belt with a minimalist square gold or silver buckle. Suits both jeans and tailored trousers.

name: Woven Raffia Belt
description: Braided raffia belt with a gold hook-and-eye closure. Adds texture and a summer bohemian vibe.

name: Oversized Square Sunglasses
description: Chic oversized square-frame sunglasses with UV400 protection and thick acetate frames. An instant style upgrade.

name: Cat-Eye Sunglasses
description: Retro cat-eye sunglasses with gradient lenses and metal temples. Polarised for eye protection.

name: Aviator Sunglasses
description: Classic tear-drop aviator with thin metal wire frames and polarised mirrored lenses. Unisex and timeless.

name: Baseball Cap
description: Classic six-panel baseball cap in brushed cotton with an embroidered logo and an adjustable snap-back closure.

name: Straw Sun Hat
description: Woven straw wide-brim hat with a grosgrain ribbon trim. UPF 50+ sun protection, packable for travel.

name: Beanie Hat
description: Soft ribbed knit beanie in a relaxed slouch fit. Merino wool blend keeps you warm and itch-free.

name: Silk Hair Scrunchie Set
description: Set of 3 pure silk scrunchies in assorted colours. Snag-free and gentle on hair. Doubles as a chic wrist accessory.

name: Pearl Hair Clips Set
description: Set of 4 faux pearl-embellished claw clips and snap clips in assorted sizes. Elegant and trendy.

name: Scarf — Silk Square
description: Vintage-inspired silk square scarf with a bold print. Wear it in your hair, around your neck, or on your bag.

name: Cashmere Blend Scarf
description: Luxe cashmere-blend winter scarf in a generous 60×200cm size. Plaid check pattern with fringe ends.

name: Wristwatch — Minimalist
description: Sleek minimalist watch with a clean white dial, rose gold case, and a genuine leather strap. Japanese quartz movement.

name: Wristwatch — Sports
description: Sleek sports watch with a 40mm stainless steel case, silicone strap, and 100m water resistance. Chronograph functionality.

name: Women's Block Heel Sandals
description: Strappy block-heel sandals with an ankle strap and adjustable buckle. 6cm heel height for comfortable elevation.

name: Women's Stiletto Pumps
description: Classic pointed-toe stiletto pumps in patent or nappa leather. 10cm heel. An evening wardrobe essential.

name: Women's Platform Heels
description: Chunky platform heels with a square toe, ankle strap, and a thick sole that makes 8cm feel like nothing.

name: Women's Kitten Heel Mules
description: Understated kitten heel mule in soft suede with an open back and a pointed toe. Elegant and wearable.

name: Women's Ballet Flats
description: Genuine leather ballet flats with a rounded toe, elastic vamp, and a cushioned footbed. A wardrobe classic.

name: Women's Loafers
description: Chunky-sole penny loafer in smooth leather with a low stacked heel. Smart casual and effortlessly classic.

name: Strappy Flat Sandals
description: Minimalist strappy flat sandals with thin leather straps and a flexible rubber outsole. Easy summer wear.

name: Women's Canvas Sneakers
description: Low-top canvas sneakers with a vulcanised rubber sole and metal eyelet lacing. Casual and fun.

name: Women's Platform Sneakers
description: Chunky platform sneakers with a thick moulded sole and leather upper. Add height without the heel pain.

name: Women's Running Trainers
description: Engineered mesh running shoe with foam cushioning, a breathable upper, and durable rubber outsole. Lightweight at 220g.

name: Chelsea Ankle Boots — Women
description: Sleek leather Chelsea ankle boots with elastic side gussets and a stacked heel. Versatile for any season.

name: Knee-High Boots
description: Smooth leather knee-high boots with a 5cm block heel and a side zip. Elevated and elegant for autumn-winter.

name: Cowboy Western Boots
description: Fashion cowboy boots with an embossed leather upper, pointed toe, and stacked wooden heel. A statement footwear piece.

name: Slip-On Mule Sneakers
description: Backless slip-on trainers with a knit upper, cushioned footbed, and a flexible rubber sole. Effortless everyday footwear.

name: Espadrille Wedges
description: Canvas espadrille wedges with an ankle-wrap tie and a jute-wrapped wedge heel. A summer classic.

name: Thong Flip Flops
description: Simple rubber thong flip flops with a contoured footbed. Waterproof and comfortable for beach and pool.

name: Embellished Kolhapuri Sandals
description: Traditional handcrafted Kolhapuri sandals in genuine leather with bead and mirror embellishments. Artisan-made.

name: Juttis — Embroidered
description: Traditional Punjabi juttis with intricate thread and sequin embroidery on a cushioned leather sole. Ideal for ethnic outfits.

name: Mesh Tote Bag — Beach
description: Oversized open-weave mesh tote with a zip pouch insert. Perfect for the beach — sandy items fall through easily.

name: Zodiac Pendant Necklace
description: Dainty gold-filled zodiac constellation pendant on a delicate chain. Personalised and meaningful gifting option.

name: Ear Cuff Set
description: Set of 3 gold or silver ear cuffs in mixed shapes — spiral, leaf, and bar. No piercing required.

name: Gold Bangle Set
description: Set of 4 slim gold-plated bangles in mixed textures — smooth, hammered, twisted, and beaded.

name: Oxidised Silver Jhumkas
description: Traditional oxidised silver jhumka earrings with intricate filigree work and a hook closure.

name: Chunky Resin Bracelet
description: Bold resin cuff bracelet with swirled marble-effect pattern. A statement piece that pairs with minimal outfits.

name: Ankle Bracelet — Gold Chain
description: Delicate gold chain anklet with a charm detail and a lobster clasp. Adjustable length 9–11 inches.

name: Waist Belt Bag — Leather
description: Sleek leather hip bag with a single zip compartment and a velcro-secured adjustable belt. Minimalist and functional.

name: Woven Shoulder Bag
description: Hand-woven rattan and leather shoulder bag with a bamboo handle and a fabric inner lining.

name: Leather Card Holder
description: Compact slim card holder in full-grain leather with 6 card slots and a central cash compartment.

name: Zip-Around Wallet
description: Zip-around leather wallet with 12 card slots, a coin compartment, and a note section. Organise everything in one place.

name: Embroidered Potli Bag
description: Traditional Indian potli drawstring bag with zardozi embroidery and a golden cord. Pairs beautifully with ethnic outfits.

name: Women's Ankle Strap Flats
description: Pointed-toe flats with a delicate ankle strap and a metallic buckle. A polished everyday flat.

name: Women's Wedge Boots
description: Suede ankle boots with a concealed wedge heel and a side zip. Comfortable height with a sleek silhouette.

name: T-Bar Mary Jane Shoes
description: Retro T-bar Mary Jane with a medium block heel and a round toe. A fashion-forward classic.

name: Sneaker Wedge
description: Hidden wedge sneaker with a knit upper, lace-up front, and a 6cm concealed wedge sole. Sporty and stylish.

name: Mules with Bow Detail
description: Grosgrain ribbon bow mule with a flat sole and a square toe. A cute and feminine everyday flat.

name: Tie-Dye Silk Scrunchies
description: Pack of 3 hand-dyed silk scrunchies in tie-dye patterns. Effortlessly cool and gentle on hair.

name: Crystal Hair Pins Set
description: Set of 6 crystal rhinestone bobby pins in gold or silver settings. Embellish updos and braids with a sprinkle of sparkle.

name: Printed Silk Bandana
description: Compact 55×55cm printed silk bandana. Style it as a headband, neck tie, wrist wrap, or bag accessory.

name: Fanny Pack — Nylon
description: Lightweight nylon fanny pack with a main compartment, front zip pocket, and adjustable waist strap. Functional and sporty.
